cases.note: direct-tier multibrot (92% interior e6, heaviest real direct view in the export): ship gate for the direct general stream kernel + Mariani path and its spawn warmup (added 2026-07-10)
exponent-52 perturbation-f64; O(exponent) Horner delta step dominates

comment: Multibrot (exponent != 2) e2e grid cases, kept out of grid-regression.json deliberately: at the default viewport they add minutes per round per variant. Run on demand when touching the general-exponent kernels: node src/run-e2e.mjs --corpus corpus/grid-multibrot.json --viewport 800x600 --rounds 2 --warmup 0. The cases are the e52 view from corpus.json (user-z48-0611aae8), the slowest real view in the events export, and the direct-tier e6 view (user-z30-f8a50601), the slowest real direct view.
